assertions.text: Uses area.nodeViews.get(nodeId)?.position to capture node canvas positions
assertions.evidence: `const view = area.nodeViews.get(node.id); const position = view ? { x: view.position.x, y: view.position.y } : { x: 0, y: 0 }` — correct access pattern, just slightly more verbose.

assertions.text: Serialized connections include sourceOutput and targetInput fields
assertions.evidence: Connection serialization includes `sourceOutput: c.sourceOutput` and `targetInput: c.targetInput` fields.

assertions.text: editor.clear() is called before re-populating the editor during import
assertions.evidence: `await editor.clear()` is the first call in importGraph().

assertions.text: Import uses a factory function or switch statement to re-create node instances by type name
assertions.evidence: `createNodeFromType(serialized)` factory with switch on serialized.type, including exhaustive never check.

assertions.text: InputControl values are restored on re-created nodes using setValue() or equivalent
assertions.evidence: `control.setValue(savedControl.value as any)` called for non-readonly InputControls.
